name: Bumper Stickers
description: Bumper Stickers is a match-three puzzle game unlike any you've seen.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Task Advances
options.description: Task Advances allow you to skip one step of a level task.

options.label: Turners
options.description: Turners allow you to change the direction of a Bumper.

options.label: Paint Cans
options.description: Paint Cans allow you to change the color of a Bumper.

options.label: Trap Count
options.description: Traps affect the board in various ways.

options.label: Rainbow Trap Weight
options.description: Rainbow Traps change the color of every bumper on the field.

options.label: Spinner Trap Weight
options.description: Spinner Traps change the direction of every bumper on the field.

options.label: Killer Trap Weight
options.description: Killer Traps end the current board immediately.
